RimWorld.RecordDef.label: sorties flown
RimWorld.RecordDef.description: The number of airstrike sorties I have flown.

RimWorld.RecordDef.label: ordinance dropped
RimWorld.RecordDef.description: The number of ordnance rounds I have dropped on airstrike sorties.

RimWorld.RecordDef.label: time on sortie
RimWorld.RecordDef.description: The total time I have spent flying airstrike sorties.
